Frequently Asked Questions
1. When did the Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti NVS Class 6th Admission Online Form 2027 start?
The online application process for Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti NVS Class 6th Admission 2026 started on 07/07 2026.
2. What is the last date to apply online for Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti NVS Class 6th Admission 2027?
The last date to submit the online application form is 31/07/2026 .
3. What is the last date to Update application fee Details?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to No Fee .
4. When will the Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti NVS Class 6th Admission Test 2027 Examination be conducted?
The examination will be conducted 28 November 2026
5. What is the mode of the Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti NVS Class 6th Admission 2027?
The NVS Class 6 application is submitted online, and the entrance exam is conducted offline .
6. How can I apply for Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti NVS Class 6th Admission Examination 2026?
Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti NVS Class 6th Admission 2027 Online Form .
tables: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti JNV NVS Class VI 6th Admissions 2027-28 Apply Online Form

Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya JNV has released the online application for admission 2027 will start from 07 July 2026 and the last date to apply will be 31 July 2026. Pan India NVS Schools are participating in Class VI Admissions 2027, candidates should read the information brochure for all the information related to the entrance exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, School List, information and other types of information and then apply.

NVS Class 6th Admissions Notification 2027-28 : Age Limit Details Candidate Must be Born Between : 01/05/2015 to 31/07/2017.
NVS Class 6th Admissions Notification 2027 : Admission Notification
Passed the class 5th exam. Spent/Studied full academic session in class III, IV and V

NVS Class 6th Admission 2027 : Document Required All the candidates will have to upload a photo, signature of themselves and their guardian. Aadhaar details/ Residence certificate Required. All types of certificates related to admission must also be uploaded. Example : Central Cast / Category / EWS / PH / ETC. Any Other Supporting Document Related to Admission.
